title: Existing OpenClaw User Upgrade
objective: Clone existing OpenClaw state, move the clone through a real upgrade path, and verify migrations, plugin indexes, runtime deps, gateway readiness, and diagnostics.

snapshots.label: pre-upgrade
snapshots.summary: Bounded redacted OpenClaw state before target upgrade

snapshots.label: post-upgrade
snapshots.summary: Bounded redacted OpenClaw state after target upgrade

phases.title: Clone Existing Env
phases.intent: Clone a durable existing env into a disposable Kova env before any upgrade actions.

phases.title: Prepare Source Runtime
phases.intent: Inspect the cloned source state before any target upgrade action.

phases.title: Upgrade To Target
phases.intent: Run the real OpenClaw upgrade path through OCM and verify post-upgrade service reconciliation.

phases.title: Post-Upgrade OpenClaw Checks
phases.intent: Verify OpenClaw state after upgrade, including plugin install index and gateway readiness.
